; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1
@.str.false = private unnamed_addr constant [6 x i8] c"false\00", align 1
@.str.true = private unnamed_addr constant [5 x i8] c"true\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @puts(ptr)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_isLeapYear
define i32 @InputKt_isLeapYear(i32 %arg0) {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 400
  %t1 = srem i32 %arg0, %t0
  %t2 = add i32 0, 0
  %t3 = icmp eq i32 %t1, %t2
  br i1 %t3, label %bb1, label %bb2
bb1:
  %t4 = add i32 0, 1
  ret i32 %t4
bb2:
  br label %bb3
bb3:
  %t5 = add i32 0, 100
  %t6 = srem i32 %arg0, %t5
  %t7 = add i32 0, 0
  %t8 = icmp eq i32 %t6, %t7
  br i1 %t8, label %bb4, label %bb5
bb4:
  %t9 = add i32 0, 0
  ret i32 %t9
bb5:
  br label %bb6
bb6:
  %t10 = add i32 0, 4
  %t11 = srem i32 %arg0, %t10
  %t12 = add i32 0, 0
  %t13 = icmp eq i32 %t11, %t12
  %t14 = zext i1 %t13 to i32
  ret i32 %t14
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 2000
  %t1 = call i32 @InputKt_isLeapYear(i32 %t0)
  %t3 = trunc i32 %t1 to i1
  %t4 = select i1 %t3, ptr @.str.true, ptr @.str.false
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t4)
  %t6 = add i32 0, 1900
  %t7 = call i32 @InputKt_isLeapYear(i32 %t6)
  %t9 = trunc i32 %t7 to i1
  %t10 = select i1 %t9, ptr @.str.true, ptr @.str.false
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t10)
  %t12 = add i32 0, 2024
  %t13 = call i32 @InputKt_isLeapYear(i32 %t12)
  %t15 = trunc i32 %t13 to i1
  %t16 = select i1 %t15, ptr @.str.true, ptr @.str.false
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t16)
  %t18 = add i32 0, 2023
  %t19 = call i32 @InputKt_isLeapYear(i32 %t18)
  %t21 = trunc i32 %t19 to i1
  %t22 = select i1 %t21, ptr @.str.true, ptr @.str.false
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t22)
  ret i32 0
}
